arts.ttl: Club not put off by Crystal Palace’s €50m asking price – Star on list as they plan for summer
arts.sum: Atlético Madrid have put Crystal Palace striker Jean-Philippe Mateta on their shortlist and aren’t put off by a €50m asking price. That’s according to Fichajes.net, who report that the Spanish side are already aware of Crystal Palace’s asking price and not put off by it. arts.ttl: Everton predicted lineup vs Crystal Palace as Moyes forced into changes
arts.sum: A depleted Everton team travel to south London to take on Crystal Palace in the Premier League this weekend. David Moyes’ men arrive at Selhurst Park buoyed by their 2-2 draw with Liverpool in the last ever Merseyside Derby at Goodison Park. James Tarkowski volleyed the ball into the back of the net in the […] The post Everton predicted lineup vs Crystal Palace as Moyes forced into changes first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Club confident Everton intend to buy player – Could try to negotiate clause in summer
arts.sum: Flamengo are confident that Everton intend to sign Charly Alcaraz on a permanent basis in the summer, even if a purchase clause is not activated in his loan deal. That’s according to journalist Fabrício Lopes via Bolavip Brasil, who reports that Alcaraz is expected to stay at Everton long-term. arts.ttl: Crystal Palace boss gives Matheus Franca update as attacker ‘prepares for more minutes’ in injury return
arts.sum: Glasner confirmed that the club are trying to ramp up his minutes to get him game-ready as soon as possible, but said that he would not be in the squad for the game against Everton, instead featuring in the U-21s’ game against Aston Villa on Monday. “He trained here all week and was very good and we talked to him today, he won’t be in the squad tomorrow, he will be preparing for more minutes on Monday with our U-21s.
